---
title: "08. 相生相克与稳定环"
subtitle: "Mutual Generation, Counteraction, and Stable Rings"
date: 2026-04-10
order: 8
categories: [synthesis, cultural, omega]
description: "Cross-text synthesis essay tracing `stableValue_ring_isomorphism` across 道德经、易经、黄帝内经、孙子兵法、几何原本 and the Gen 2 papers."
---

## 定理锚点 / Lean Anchors

| 角色 | 定理 |
|---|---|
| 主定理核 | `stableValue_ring_isomorphism` |
| 支撑定理 1 | `modular_projection_add_no_carry` |
| 支撑定理 2 | `stableAdd_comm` |

## 文本导航 / Classical Works

- [道德经](../tao-te-ching/index.qmd)
- [易经](../i-ching/index.qmd)
- [孙子兵法](../sunzi/index.qmd)
- [黄帝内经](../huangdi-neijing/index.qmd)
- [几何原本](../elements/index.qmd)

## 论文导航 / Gen 2 Papers

- [Upper Fibers and Witness Covers for the Fibonacci Order-of-Apparition Map](../../science/gen2/fibonacci-moduli-cross-resolution-arithmetic.qmd)
- [Finite-Window Rigidity in Fibonacci Numeration](../../science/gen2/resolution-folding-core-symbolic-dynamics.qmd)

## Infographic

![synthesis_08_ring_arithmetic Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/synthesis_08_ring_arithmetic_infographic.png)

## Video

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/synthesis_08_ring_arithmetic_video.mp4 >}}

**Media Downloads:**

- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/synthesis_08_ring_arithmetic_infographic.png)
- [Video (MP4)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/synthesis_08_ring_arithmetic_video.mp4)
- [Slides (PDF)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/synthesis_08_ring_arithmetic_slides.pdf)

## 正文 / Essay

{{< include articles/synthesis_08_ring_arithmetic.md >}}

---

[Back to Synthesis Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
